name: Squall Line
flavorHeadline: Habanero-forward with tropical mango counter, complex heat
heatDescriptor: The storm is here — tropical sweetness chased by real heat
jarImageAlt: Jar of Tomato Warning Squall Line EF-3 hot sauce with a deep red label
productStory: When a squall line rolls through, you hear it before you see it. That's this sauce — habanero heat arriving fast, then mango stepping in like sunshine through a break in the clouds. It's the moment the storm gets interesting and you realize you're not going inside.
